calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Nathan Shomer.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 11:35:17 a.m.,and concluding at 11:59:53 a.m. (D505)

Daniel Ishu, Esq. representing Plaintiff Tenth and Market, LLC, via Zoom Video Conference.
Patti Quinsay, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Nathan Shomer not appearing.

Complaint filed June 26, 2023.
Proof of publication filed May 28, 2024.
Notice of motion/ motion for request of default judgment filed Feb. 13, 2025
Does dismissed on Sept. 26, 2024

Counsel to summarize the submitted supplemental declarations.
The Court examines Patti Quinsay, witness for Plaintiff.
Counsel provides offer of proof to the request for judgment.

Witness confirms that statements and declarations made are true and correct and is the best of her professional knowledge.

After reviewing the declarations, hearing the testimony and statements, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff.
The plaintiff shall recover from the defendant the following:
Damages $53,094.86
Pre-judgment interest $31,996.65
Attorney's Fees $6,000.00
Costs $3,289.18

Total Judgment $94,380.69

Proposed judgment signed and filed

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Continued To Apr-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2025 Continued To Mar-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for Default Judgment against Defendant Nathan Shomer.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:47:31 a.m., and concluding at 9:56:31 a.m. (D505)

Appearances made:
Daniel Ishu, Esq. representing Plaintiff Tenth and Market, LLC via Zoom Video Conference.
Patty Quinsay, sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines Plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.

Counsel states that damages sought is significantly different from when the complaint was first filed.

The Court continues this matter to allow for Plaintiff to cure issues and to provide courtesy copies at least 5 court days before the hearing.

The matter is reset for March 14, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept.505.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Feb-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Continued To Jan-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25 am and concluding at 9:34 am

Plaintiff Tenth and Market LLC is represented by Daniel Ishu, Esq.
Defendant Nathan Shomer not appearing.

Plaintiff's witness is not available for todays hearing.

The Court continues the matter for the appearance of Plaintiffs witness.

The matter is continued to January 24, 2025. at 9:00 am in Department 505.
